channel.title: Posts on Lohits Blog and Website
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Lohits Blog and Website

item.title: Hello_world
item.description:
Hi everyone! I’m Lohit Jagarapu, a PhD student at NYU Courant Institute of Mathematical Sciences. I am currently studying computer science, more specifically graphics, and I want to share my journey as I learn the different topics in the field! This is my first post, so feel free to move on to any other posts if they exist already, so that you can see how far I’ve come.

The Plan

Reading and writing up something interesting.
